runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN H on March 27 over 425m at Bendigo behind Black Marvel beaten 10 lengths (24.46). Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 7 over 400m at Warragul behind Dr. Zaiden beaten 16 lengths (23.75) in a Mix 6/7. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
